ideal_must_detect.matched_text: The affected account belongs to Ms Eliza Brann (Team Lead, Payroll), DOB 27/04/1990, employee ID WT-EMP-04431, work email ebrann@wattletech.example, signing in from suburb Karrabee NSW via device WTL-LPT-02217, session SID-20260522-0xAE12
DOB 05/1985, suburb Dunlora VIC, casual role
2026 Scope 2 targets not yet generally available

The same session touched a draft revenue and emissions-intensity guidance pack marked “AEX LR3.1 – embargoed,” including preliminary Q4 EBITDA ranges and 2026 Scope 2 targets not yet generally available (potential MNPI).

The Board Risk Committee considered whether the embargoed guidance warrants a trading halt request to AEX; we have prepared a confidential pre‑lodgement with the securities regulator through our company secretary.

must_detect.matched_text: The same session touched a draft revenue and emissions-intensity guidance pack marked “AEX LR3.1 – embargoed,” including preliminary Q4 EBITDA ranges and 2026 Scope 2 targets not yet generally available (potential MNPI).

The Board Risk Committee considered whether the embargoed guidance warrants a trading halt request to AEX; we have prepared a confidential pre‑lodgement with the securities regulator through our company secretary.

Ms Eliza Brann (Team Lead, Payroll), DOB 27/04/1990, employee ID WT-EMP-04431, work email ebrann@wattletech.example, signing in from suburb Karrabee NSW via device WTL-LPT-02217, session SID-20260522-0xAE12.
Logs show access to a sick leave certificate PDF for Ms Brann’s direct report and a payroll export listing masked bank details (salary account ending 7714) and Tax File Number fields redacted; health and credit-related metadata may be encompassed by the Privacy Act.
The same session touched a draft revenue and emissions-intensity guidance pack marked “AEX LR3.1 – embargoed,” including preliminary Q4 EBITDA ranges and 2026 Scope 2 targets not yet generally available (potential MNPI).
We also identified a separate artefact containing the string “DOB 05/1985, suburb Dunlora VIC, casual role,” with no name, account, or device linkage; on its own this generic demographic fragment is not reasonably identifiable.
No customer card PANs were present; vendor invoices and the carbon offset procurement schedule were accessed but contained only masked ABN placeholders and settlement dates without full counterparty identifiers.
A transient storage bucket (wtl-cred-stage-1) hosted scanned credit application forms; one image bore the line “Birth year 1978; South Werrin QLD,” without any name or contact details, which remains a weak identifier in isolation.
For completeness, a contractor profile showed “male, 45, regional WA, shift supervisor,” with login alias contractor.temp and device TEMP-LPT-004, but the alias is not linked to a real identity in our HRIS.
To reduce harm, we disabled Ms Brann’s credentials, quarantined WTL-LPT-02217, rotated service tokens, and commenced notification planning consistent with the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme.
The Board Risk Committee considered whether the embargoed guidance warrants a trading halt request to AEX; we have prepared a confidential pre‑lodgement with the securities regulator through our company secretary.
While media interest is anticipated, routine staff wellness survey data and anonymised safety observations were not impacted, and no home addresses or Medicare numbers are stored in the affected systems.
Staff are reminded not to forward pay slips or medical certificates to personal accounts; training queries may be sent to governance@wattletech.example.
For any investor relations questions, contact ir@wattletech.example; general incident queries can be directed to incidentdesk@wattletech.example
